value.found_quote:
### Connect from another device

Once a Remote Control session is active, you have a few ways to connect from another device:
value.rationale: The page is Anthropic's Claude Code documentation describing Remote Control, which includes a dedicated "Connect from another device" section explaining how to connect from a browser, QR code, or the Claude app. The feature is described as being "in research preview and available on all plans," so lifecycle status is preview.
